bird.name: Blue bird-of-paradise
bird.summary: The blue bird-of-paradise (Paradisornis rudolphi) is a large species of bird-of-paradise. It is the only species in the genus Paradisornis,…

relations.subject: Blue bird-of-paradise
relations.evidence: Due to ongoing habitat loss, limited range, small population size, and, in some areas, hunting for its highly prized plumes, the rare blue bird-of-paradise is classified as Near Threatened on the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species. It is listed in Appendix II of CITES
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Blue bird-of-paradise
relations.evidence: Due to ongoing habitat loss, limited range, small population size, and, in some areas, hunting for its highly prized plumes, the rare blue bird-of-paradise is classified as Near Threatened on the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species. It is listed in Appendix II of CITES
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.object_summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。
